title: Project Pulse
summary: The Electron-managed continuity baseline is validated and ready for operator-facing visibility work while the longer-term native-runtime lanes stay explicit.
source: GitHub-first NEXUS truth sweep plus issue #54 readiness validation.
nextAction: Write back the continuity-validation evidence, keep the current baseline readable, and then continue README and runtime-topology follow-on work without blurring the stack boundary.

lanes.title: Desktop readiness validation
lanes.summary: Continuity validation is green on the current Electron and Node baseline, with 72 out of 72 automated checks passing in the issue-54 lane.
lanes.nextAction: Keep the baseline diagnosable and turn the findings into operator-visible readiness and progress cues.

lanes.title: README direction clarification
lanes.summary: The repo README already distinguishes the current Electron baseline from the approved future native-C plus Avalonia direction, but the open PR still needs reconciliation and landing.
lanes.nextAction: Carry the verified issue-54 findings into the PR review and land the clarification without reopening the stack decision.

lanes.title: Packaging and runtime topology
lanes.summary: Native-C-first topology design remains active, with the continuity baseline explicitly preserved as the migration starting point rather than the target stack.
lanes.nextAction: Continue the runtime-boundary definition after the current baseline findings and writeback are captured.

lanes.title: Conversation-surface program model
lanes.summary: The child-program and embedded-helper surface model is queued behind the continuity-validation and runtime-topology work already in flight.
lanes.nextAction: Unblock this lane after the current operator baseline and runtime topology decisions are recorded.

lanes.title: ASCENT shared-surface placeholder
lanes.summary: Reserved integration space only. This remains intentionally parked and should not pull focus away from the current continuity and runtime lanes.
lanes.nextAction: Leave parked until the active desktop and conversation-surface lanes warrant reopening it.

lanes.title: ASCENT notification placeholder
lanes.summary: Reserved notification integration space only. It stays parked as a placeholder rather than active build work.
lanes.nextAction: Keep parked until the current NEXUS execution lanes are materially further along.
